mapper.sql: id, user_id, book_title, author, isbn, reading_status, start_date, finish_date, rating, notes_content, tags, cover_image, page_count, current_page, reading_time, is_favorite, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM reading_notes WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM reading_notes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND reading_status = #{readingStatus} ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT FROM reading_notes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ( book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR notes_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM reading_notes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_favorite = true ORDER BY created_time DESC
